case_title: NORMAN LOUIE VS. RACHEL T. VALDES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, NORMAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, NORMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALDES, RACHEL T. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1405 - 41ST AVE. S.F. CA. 94122, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VALDES, RACHEL T.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT VALDES, RACHEL T.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, NORMAN AS TO DEFENDANT VALDES, RACHEL T. DOES 1 THRU 20, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, NORMAN SERVED JAN-04-2008, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 20, INCL.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $50.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, NORMAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT VALDES, RACHEL T.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, NORMAN SERVED JAN-04-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALDES, RACHEL T.
